header.title: Who uses Sttok?
header.description: Designed for legal and financial teams managing the corporate life of companies.

items.title: Companies with many shareholders
items.content: Manage captable, official shareholder register, percentages and shareholder agreements. Centralize corporate groups with multiple entities on a single platform.

items.title: Companies with incentive plans
items.content: Startups and scale-ups with phantoms, stock options and vesting for employees. Individual access portal for each beneficiary.

items.title: Board Secretaries
items.content: Digital convening of shareholder meetings and boards, vote delegations, resolutions and centralized corporate documentation. Zero paper bureaucracy.

items.title: Lawyers and advisors
items.content: Manage multiple client companies from a single dashboard. Complete history, automatically generated documents, no outdated spreadsheets.
